prime_young_adults.label: Half-Price Amazon Prime for Ages 18–24
prime_young_adults.blurb: Get Amazon Prime at the student rate — plus Prime Gaming unlocks free PC games and in-game loot every month.

audible.label: Listen to industry books on Audible — free trial for new members
audible.blurb: From Masters of Doom to The Art of Game Design — Audible has the game dev reading list, all in audio. Perfect for long playtests, commutes, and crunch.
